name: Boss says no witnesses to my warehouse injury, will claim fail?
description: No, medical proof and your account work.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: Boss says no witnesses to my warehouse injury, will claim fail?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, medical proof and your account work.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, your report, medical records, and circumstances suffice; doctor testimony key.[1][2] Key factors: Photos, incident details to physician.[1] Build case with evidence trail.[2] Comp no-fault system helps.[1]
